answers: Tennis is a racquet sport played on a rectangular court. Players hit a felt-covered ball over a net, and it can be played as singles (1v1) or doubles (2v2). The four Grand Slams are the biggest tournaments in tennis.
Tennis scoring ta ektu unique — Love (0), 15, 30, 40, then game. Sets jittar jonno 6 games lagbe, ar match ta usually best of 3 or 5 sets. Deuce hole advantage point khelte hoy.
The tennis world has seen legends like Roger Federer, Rafael Nadal, Novak Djokovic, and Serena Williams. These players have dominated the Grand Slams and inspired millions of fans worldwide.

Tennis courts come in three main types — grass (Wimbledon), clay (French Open), and hard court (US Open, Australian Open). Each surface affects ball speed and bounce differently, requiring players to adapt their game.
